resource.chars:
**Transcription:**
大水草峯
張萱搗練圖

**Romanization (Mandarin pinyin):**
Dà shuǐ cǎo fēng / Zhāng Xuān dǎo liàn tú

**Gloss:**
"[Collection seal: Da Shui Cao Feng] / *Picture of Zhang Xuan's Pounding and Preparing Silk*" — a title label identifying the handscroll as a work attributed to the Tang painter Zhang Xuan.

item.value: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" d="M29089.03846,999.57294h132.41843v0h132.41843v-495.2548v-495.2548h-132.41843h-132.41843v495.2548z" data-paper-data="{"strokeWidth":1,"rotation":0,"annotation":null,"nonHoverStrokeColor":["Color",0,0.74902,1],"editable":true}" id="rectangle_a7f79408-6bdd-41e9-9a59-6e09a102f664" fill-opacity="0.00001" fill="#00bfff" fill-rule="nonzero" stroke="#00bfff" stroke-width="8.43137" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="miter" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-dasharray="" stroke-dashoffset="0" font-family="none" font-weight="none" font-size="none" text-anchor="none" style="mix-blend-mode: normal"/></svg>

resource.chars:
**Transcription:**

右宣和臨張萱搗練圖明昌以郡望題
戴敦之七璽盖亦變之深乃知嬀母之
姿亦有勁其驛者何邵齊郡張紳

**Romanization (Pinyin):**
Yòu Xuānhé lín Zhāng Xuān dǎoliàn tú, Míngchāng yǐ jùn wàng tí / Dài Dūn zhī qī xǐ, gài yì biàn zhī shēn, nǎi zhī Guī mǔ zhī / zī yì yǒu jìng, qí yì zhě hé? Shào Qí jùn Zhāng Shēn.

**Gloss:**
A colophon noting that this is a Xuanhe-period copy after Zhang Xuan's *Silk-Beaters* painting, inscribed under the Mingchang reign title with seven imperial seals, followed by reflective remarks on the figures' vigor, signed by Zhang Shen of Shaoqi Commandery.

resource.chars:
**Transcription (seal script / zhuanshu):**
四庫全書薈要

**Romanization:**
Sì Kù Quán Shū Huì Yào

**Gloss:**
Imperial seal of the *Siku Quanshu Huiyao* ("Essential Compendium of the Complete Library of the Four Treasuries"), a Qianlong-era imperial collection.

resource.chars: A seated female figure in an elaborate pale pink patterned robe with red sash details raises one hand in a delicate gesture; her black hair is elaborately dressed with a decorative hairpin, and she sits on a dark lacquered stool with a green cushion.

resource.chars:
**Transcription:**
宋徽宗摹張萱搗練圖真蹟
金章宗題
髙江邨清吟堂秘藏

**Romanization:**
Sòng Huīzōng mó Zhāng Xuān Dǎoliàn tú zhēnjī / Jīn Zhāngzōng tí / Gāo Jiāngcūn Qīngyíntáng mìcáng

**Gloss:**
"Authentic work: Emperor Huizong of Song copying Zhang Xuan's *Pounding Silk*; inscribed by Emperor Zhangzong of Jin; secretly preserved in Gao Jiangcun's Qingyin Studio."

item.value: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" d="M29861.35184,56.98561h89.36756v0h89.36756v1285.7284v1285.7284h-89.36756h-89.36756v-1285.7284z" data-paper-data="{"strokeWidth":1,"rotation":0,"annotation":null,"nonHoverStrokeColor":["Color",0,0.74902,1],"editable":true}" id="rectangle_b8bf0a32-414d-409c-bd45-c9139732796b" fill-opacity="0.00001" fill="#00bfff" fill-rule="nonzero" stroke="#00bfff" stroke-width="67.45098" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="miter" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-dasharray="" stroke-dashoffset="0" font-family="none" font-weight="none" font-size="none" text-anchor="none" style="mix-blend-mode: normal"/></svg>

resource.chars:
## Transcription

宋徽宗摹唐萱摠練圖老見松氣老人畫縹窠親五錦幕如新大彼
色明昌墨書標範者張紳一彼與丑召遷高江郡收藏前題記彼
再題彼畫者珍極而江郡鏈不截此老者鏡夏録刻花題康詞
兩年彼復立廣縣己邱年夏鏡夏録列成后八年所溺前懸宗
迄去家岱嘗行巧閨雅義絕倫必堂和可列政嘗匯堂祈巧圖見鏡
夏録中江郡流藏者嘗灣精奉則孝畫者某精墨畫礎于知
又明名書宣和瘦金書惟堂和仰題益圖：各丙仁口明昌書圖子
丙以亇監兩知見研此雅志亦異一逕也先諸戊戌間月羅[seal]識

**Romanization (pinyin, approximate):**
Sòng Huīzōng mó Táng Xuān zǒng liàn tú lǎo jiàn sōng qì lǎo rén huà piāo kē qīn wǔ jǐn mù rú xīn dà bǐ…

**Gloss:**
A colophon recording that Emperor Huizong of Song copied a Tang dynasty silk-weaving figure composition, with notes on connoisseurship, provenance, collectors, and inscriptions including a reference to the *Slender Gold* calligraphy style and the Ming-Chang era seals.

item.value: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" d="M3814.98702,228.73739h-642.79211v0h-642.79211v1329.99775v1329.99775h642.79211h642.79211v-1329.99775z" data-paper-data="{"strokeWidth":1,"rotation":0,"annotation":null,"nonHoverStrokeColor":["Color",0,0.74902,1],"editable":true}" id="rectangle_38afc2d0-97c2-491b-8ff8-619733a04c13" fill-opacity="0.00001" fill="#00bfff" fill-rule="nonzero" stroke="#00bfff" stroke-width="129.90234" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="miter" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-dasharray="" stroke-dashoffset="0" font-family="none" font-weight="none" font-size="none" text-anchor="none" style="mix-blend-mode: normal"/></svg>

resource.chars: A woman in a pink upper garment and blue skirt leans against a tall wooden post, her right hand resting on it and her left arm hanging loosely at her side; her hair is dressed in a high bun with ornaments, and a small blue floral mark is visible on her forehead.

item.value: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" d="M26305.20338,591.17718h328.81176v0h328.81176v1025.95812v1025.95812h-328.81176h-328.81176v-1025.95812z" data-paper-data="{"strokeWidth":1,"rotation":0,"annotation":null,"nonHoverStrokeColor":["Color",0,0.74902,1],"editable":true}" id="rectangle_4f1699af-c49d-409e-bf3c-e9ad605d6964" fill-opacity="0.00001" fill="#00bfff" fill-rule="nonzero" stroke="#00bfff" stroke-width="12.52916" stroke-linecap="butt" stroke-linejoin="miter" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-dasharray="" stroke-dashoffset="0" font-family="none" font-weight="none" font-size="none" text-anchor="none" style="mix-blend-mode: normal"/></svg>

resource.chars: The crop shows a tall, slender bronze incense stand (or lamp stand) with an ornately decorated domed base featuring scrollwork and floral patterns in gilt, a long cylindrical shaft, and a small red ribbon or cord tied near the top. The background is divided into a tan/ochre upper section and a pale turquoise-green lower section.
